exemptions.reason: Intake capture is an implementation manifest artifact rather than a standalone v18 contract schema.
Log bundle shape is a test/logging artifact owned by the harness layer rather than the contract substrate.
Route compiler capabilities are an input corpus for route tests; provider capability schemas cover provider capability artifacts.
Synthesis finalization is enforced by the synthesis-finalization checker and traceability/artifact contracts.
Negative synthesis-finalization fixture is owned by the synthesis-finalization checker, not Draft 2020-12 schema validation.
